subcodes.first_line: Due to lack of time, a brief response is penned concerning the matter of the Mashriqu'l-Adhkár to his honour Áqá Músá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از عدم فرصت مختصر جواب مرقوم میشود در مسئله مشرق الاذکار بجناب آقا موسی از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @review of publications, @photographs and recordings
